lastSummary: Checked the past hour and found one pushed sync commit on record: 5c83860 at 6:30 PM EDT, plus new uncommitted workspace-memory updates after that point.

Recorded the missing daily-note bullet for the new managed hourly worker `maintain-workspace-hourly`, which now combines top-of-hour memory/task upkeep with immediate follow-on git sync and replaces the old separate `sync-workspace-git-hourly` cadence.

Reread active state, curated memory, tasks, events, recurring duties, and worker files; the new :00 combined-maintenance rhythm and managed-worker bootstrap pattern were already reflected in durable task/protocol memory, so no further stale-state edits were needed this pass.
